title: Create: Stratus Terra
description:
This a vanilla+ style create modpack designed for the Create: Stratus Terra minecraft server.

It is based around the famous create mod and its addons, with each mod contributing to a player-friendly, social experience.
body: This a vanilla+ style create modpack designed for the Create: Stratus Terra minecraft server. It is based around the famous create mod and its addons, with each mod contributing to a player-friendly, social experience. This modpack includes many client improvements, such as fps improving mods and small QoL ones. The worldgen is also greatly enhanced, with terrain mods, aswell as many mods that add points of interest, most notably yungs mods. The focus if this pack is mostly the create mod however, therefore we expand creativity by including many complementary create addons. Exploration is fine if you have decent terrain gen, but to make the world feel even more alive, we added various creature mods for players to explore and soak in the atmosphere. For now, we focus on bringing you the best Create mod experience with our server, which is also calles "Create: Stratus Terra" and uses this modpack as its base. Our community is, as to quote one of our members "pretty chill" and is always up to help you out. We have 300+ members on our discord already, expanding every day. When the Create: Simulated Project releases, we will be one of the first to add it to this modpack for everybody on the server to enjoy and experience in a vanilla+ style, with no mods feeling too much, or out of place! So, get ready to experience a beautiful world, play the Create mod in all of its glory, team up with friends to raid vanilla friendly dungeons, explore the world, build your factories, process goods and trade with other players! Get ready, to create.
